name: Multi-Source Hash Analysis
description: Performs comprehensive file hash analysis across multiple threat intelligence sources. When a suspicious hash alert arrives, the playbook enriches the hash via VirusTotal for detection ratios and malware family identification, then submits to a sandbox for behavioral analysis. AI correlates the results to determine malicious confidence, identify malware families, and map to MITRE ATT&CK techniques. Confirmed malicious hashes trigger endpoint quarantine, blocklist addition, and SOC notification. Benign hashes are documented and closed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Retrieve detection ratios, malware family labels, and community reputation for file hashes

required_integrations.name: Malware Sandbox
required_integrations.reason: Submit hash for behavioral detonation analysis to identify runtime behaviors and network indicators

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Quarantine files matching confirmed malicious hashes on endpoints

config.description: Triggers when a suspicious file hash alert is ingested from threat feeds, EDR, or manual submission

config.code:
import re

alert = inputs.get('alert', {})
raw_text = str(alert)

sha256_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{64}\b'
sha1_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{40}\b'
md5_pattern = r'\b[a-fA-F0-9]{32}\b'

sha256_hashes = list(set(re.findall(sha256_pattern, raw_text)))
sha1_hashes = list(set(re.findall(sha1_pattern, raw_text)))
md5_hashes = list(set(re.findall(md5_pattern, raw_text)))

# Deduplicate: sha1 matches may overlap with sha256 substrings
sha1_clean = [h for h in sha1_hashes if h not in [s[:40] for s in sha256_hashes]]

primary_hash = sha256_hashes[0] if sha256_hashes else (sha1_clean[0] if sha1_clean else (md5_hashes[0] if md5_hashes else None))
hash_type = 'sha256' if sha256_hashes else ('sha1' if sha1_clean else ('md5' if md5_hashes else 'unknown'))

result = {
    'primary_hash': primary_hash,
    'hash_type': hash_type,
    'sha256_hashes': sha256_hashes,
    'sha1_hashes': sha1_clean,
    'md5_hashes': md5_hashes,
    'total_unique': len(sha256_hashes) + len(sha1_clean) + len(md5_hashes),
    'file_name': alert.get('file_name', 'unknown')
}
config.description: Extracts and categorizes all file hashes (SHA256, SHA1, MD5) from the alert data
Enriches the primary hash via VirusTotal to retrieve detection ratios, malware family labels, first/last seen dates, and community reputation
Submits the hash to the malware sandbox for behavioral detonation analysis including process activity, network communication, and file system changes

config.additional_instructions: Correlate VirusTotal detection results with sandbox behavioral analysis. Determine malicious confidence, identify malware family, map to MITRE ATT&CK techniques, and assess potential impact if executed on endpoint.
config.description: AI-powered correlation of VT results and sandbox analysis to determine final malware verdict with ATT&CK mapping
Routes based on whether the combined VT and sandbox analysis confirms the hash as malicious
Quarantines any files matching the malicious hash on all endpoints via CrowdStrike EDR

data.label: Add Hash to Blocklist & Notify SOC

config.description: Adds the malicious hash to the blocklist and notifies the SOC team with full analysis results

parameters.note:
Multi-source hash analysis completed.

Hash: {{code_1.outputs.result.primary_hash}} ({{code_1.outputs.result.hash_type}})
File: {{code_1.outputs.result.file_name}}
Verdict: Benign / Inconclusive

No blocking action required.

Riggs AI Summary:
{{analyze_2.summary}}

config.description: Documents the benign hash analysis result with no blocking action taken
